subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Abhá Beauty! Place upon thy head the crown of steadfastness in the Covenant, and receive tribute from the realm of the Supreme Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی از ثبوت بر میثاق تاجی بر سر نه و خراج ازاقلیم علیین گیر
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
